p-e-w/heretic ·GitHub ⭐ 12386 Python · LLM-Ablation, AI-Safety, Model-Correction, GPU-Optimization, Machine-Learning

What it is

A sophisticated CLI tool automating directional ablation techniques natively removing "safety alignment" censorship filters from transformer LLMs without necessitating expensive post-training.

Problems solved

  • Bypasses the extreme computational costs generally tied to Fine-Tuning or explicitly retraining LLM models merely focused on mitigating RLHF safety refusals
  • relying intelligently on ablation parameter extraction instead.

How to get started

Activate a Python environment, pip install -U heretic-llm, followed precisely by executing heretic Qwen/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 allocating it natively against appropriate GPU limits.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

Heretic positions itself strictly as an "automatic ablation" orchestration tool aimed explicitly at developers pursuing local language model manipulation natively overcoming synthetic RLHF-induced compliance boundaries.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Manually dissecting weight layers mapping explicit "refusal directions" is highly laborious and prone natively to drastically deteriorating model intelligence (KL divergence). Heretic resolves this leveraging intelligent Bayesian optimization (Optuna) isolating explicit refusal tensors natively minimizing downstream intellectual decay aggressively.

3. Technical Architecture

Architected fundamentally using PyTorch evaluating TPE-based parameter optimizer sequences explicitly isolating transformer projection matrices extracting specific cosine-similarity logic boundaries deterministically across supported parameter classes.

4. Core Implementation

Utilizes difference-of-means math processing layer embeddings comparing precisely "harmless" versus "harmful" vectors predicting multi-dimensional gradients natively applying orthogonal attenuation matrices preventing specific tokens denoting refusals firing efficiently.

5. Code Organization

Structured gracefully utilizing a root module mapping config.default.toml tracking matrix layers cleanly handling dense and specific MoE operations natively isolating complex interpretability calculations selectively avoiding hybrid models explicitly.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Run the base module defining quantization = bnb_4bit explicitly enabling massive multi-billion parameter decoding directly over domestic 24GB GPUs isolating precisely layer 16-24 tensors safely.

7. Summary

A remarkably proficient interpretability utility simplifying immensely complex weight manipulation math into straightforward command-line logic accelerating censorship attenuation efficiently retaining massive cognitive utility.
